title: Bath Bombs, Gift Set Rich in Essential Oils Natural Handmade Bath&Spa Fizzles Marvelous Salts to Moisturize Skin and Relieve Stress Romantic Gifts for Her/Him/Girlfriend/Wife (Pack of 12)
features: 🎁Sweet & Romantic Gift Set - Perfect for birthdays, Christmas, anniversaries & more! This 12-piece bath bomb set lets loved ones feel your care through vibrant colors and soothing fragrances.
💌Fun & Magical Bath Time - Kids adore the fairy-tale immersion! Bath bombs fizz with vibrant bubbles, fast-spinning hisses, and floating surprises for sensory play.
🍀100% Natural & Gentle - Safe for all ages! Made with organic plant essential oils—no residue, no irritation. Ideal for dry/sensitive skin.
🚿Spa-Like Aromatherapy - Relieve stress and soften skin! Moisturizing oils + floral scents cleanse, deodorize, and repair tired skin after long days.
💐Handmade Luxury - 12 unique 70g bath bombs, crafted for lasting fragrance and skin-nourishing effects. Tub-friendly & eco-conscious.

specifications_table.Special ingredients: ‎essential oils, shea butter, coconut oil, bubbly moisture
